package rulecoverage

func NegativeSliceAppendWithoutPreallocKnownBound() string {
    ruleID := "slice_append_without_prealloc_known_bound"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Slice append inside a range loop without visible preallocation when the bound is locally known."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
